title: Salty Crispy Egyptian Garlic Toast
description: A nostalgic Egyptian snack of crunchy toast, infused with a salty garlic spread and a hint of olive oil for a gooey center.

ingredients.name: whole wheat bread
ingredients.notes: use Baladi or local Egyptian bread for authenticity

instructions: Preheat a skillet or non-stick pan over medium heat (about 175–190°C).
Peel and crush the garlic cloves into a fine paste; add the pinch of black pepper if using.
Stir in the olive oil and sea salt to the garlic paste until well combined.
Spread the garlic-olive oil mixture evenly over each slice of bread.
Place the bread slices in the heated skillet; cook for 3–4 minutes on each side until the crust is golden‑brown and the toast feels firm.
Remove from heat, slice into bite‑sized pieces if desired, and serve immediately while warm.
